_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your credentials
_footywire: No credentials needed — Footywire is scraped directly. Just run from a home machine.
_supercoach_optional: Only needed for real-time ownership % data. Leave blank to skip.
_aflf_optional: Only needed for AFL Fantasy ownership data. Leave blank to skip.
_output: Where to write players.json — default is next to aflfantasywire.html
